mapper.select: SELECT c.* FROM ts_story_chapter c INNER JOIN ts_story_info s ON s.id = c.story_id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.is_deleted = 0 AND (c.status IS NULL OR c.status != 0) LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(chapter_no), 0) FROM ts_story_chapter WHERE story_id = #{storyId} AND (status IS NULL OR status != 0)
SELECT role_id FROM ts_story_chapter_forbidden_role WHERE chapter_id = #{chapterId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ts_story_chapter_forbidden_role (story_id, chapter_id, role_id) VALUES (#{storyId}, #{chapterId}, #{roleId})
mapper.update: UPDATE ts_story_chapter SET status = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE story_id = #{storyId} AND (status IS NULL OR status != 0)
